MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE And Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ
Off Calendar Dec-10-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Murray, Esq., / Juhyung Harold Lee, Esq., ALTSHULER BERZON LLP (415) 421-7151 mmurray@altber.com / hlee@altber.com Attorneys for Petitioner Eric Gustafson
Sloan R. Simmons, Esq., LOZANO SMITH (916) 329-7433 ssimmons@lozanosmith.com Attorney for Respondents SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT and DR. MARIA SU
Tamara Willett, CSR# 4609 415-272-1753 sbcglobal.net Court Reporter

PETITIONER ERIC GUSTAFSON'S Motion For Peremptory Writ. Court takes the matter under submission.
